name: Rice Stuffed Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups wild and long grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the bottom of the artichokes to stand upright.
2. Remove thorns from the tips of the leaves.
3. Cut off and discard the top third of each artichoke.
4. Tie a lemon slice to the top and bottom of each artichoke.
5. Place the artichokes in a saucepot with water to cover, over high heat.
6. Add peppercorns, lemon juice, salt, and remaining lemon slices.
7. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 30-60 minutes until tender.
8. Remove from water, remove lemon slices, invert, and drain thoroughly.
9. Heat the stock in a saucepot over high heat until boiling.
10. Add rice mixture, cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 23-25 minutes.
11. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
12. Remove center leaves from cooled artichokes.
13. Remove the choke with a spoon.
14. Fill each artichoke with heated rice mixture and sprinkle with cashews.
15. Serve hot, with mayonnaise on the side.
